description.ko: 정교한 구조적 기하학과 혼돈스러운 디지털 왜곡 사이의 접점을 시각적으로 탐구하며, KURO-X 특유의 다크한 미학을 선보입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of the intersection between rigid structural geometry and chaotic digital corruption, featuring the KURO-X signature dark aesthetic.

prompt: Futuristic KURO-X interface with sharp geometric shapes, digital glitch artifacts, RGB chromatic aberration, fragmented 3D polygons, dark slate background, neon cyan and magenta light leaks, high-tech cybernetic aesthetic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, hyper-detailed digital distortion
